## Milestone: M[N] - [Name]

## Status

- [ ] All issues in this milestone are complete
- [ ] All tests pass
- [ ] Code reviewed and merged to dev
- [ ] Faculty Q&A session completed
- [ ] Ready for dev -> main merge

## Issues

- [ ] Issue [N] - [Title]
- [ ] Issue [N+1] - [Title]
- [ ] Issue [N+2] - [Title]
- [ ] Issue [N+3] - [Title]

## Notes

Any blockers, decisions, or deviations from plan.
